data.name: kick 808
data.code: arrange([4, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.9)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.1).gain(1)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ bd bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.1).gain(1)], [4, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").lpf(600).gain(0.7)])

data.name: dembow snare
data.code: arrange([4, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ sd ~ sd").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.74)], [8, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ sd ~ sd").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.84)], [8, s("~ ~ [sd sd] ~ ~ sd ~ sd").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.84)], [4, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ sd ~ sd").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.6)])

data.name: conga/bongo
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [8, s("~ crate_conga ~ crate_bongo ~ crate_conga crate_bongo ~").gain(0.32).room(0.12)], [8, s("~ crate_conga ~ crate_bongo crate_conga ~ crate_bongo crate_conga").gain(0.32).room(0.12)], [4, silence])

data.name: 808 bass
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [8, note("<c1 c1 eb1 g0>").struct("x ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").s("sine").decay(0.3).sustain(0.35).release(0.18).slide(0.1).shape(0.14).lpf(240).gain(0.64)], [8, note("<c1 c1 eb1 g0>").struct("x ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").s("sine").decay(0.3).sustain(0.35).release(0.18).slide(0.1).shape(0.14).lpf(240).gain(0.64)], [4, silence])

data.name: lead menor
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [8, note("c5 ~ eb5 ~ g5 ~ f5 eb5").s("square").lpf(2200).lpq(4).shape(0.15).delay(0.18).delayfeedback(0.32).gain(0.32)], [8, note("c5 ~ eb5 ~ g5 ~ bb5 g5").s("square").lpf(2200).lpq(4).shape(0.15).delay(0.18).gain(0.32)], [4, silence])
